action: Created data/questions.json (100 TasteType 3.1 questions) and validate_questions.py TDD validation script. TDD audit PASS on 2nd attempt after commit.
notes: Philosophy questions Q55-Q74 have only 2 options (A/B) per source doc — validation updated to accept 2+ options. Empty scores: {} found in 52 neutral options — intentional design per Executor.

action: Created data/types.json (80 TasteType 3.1 personality types) and validate_types.py TDD script. Commit 6a5a150.

Complete rewrite of scoring.js for TasteType 3.1: selectQuestions (stratified sampling 24q), calculateScores (hasOwnProperty guard), calculatePercentages, determineDominant, determineSecondary (all-zero guard + 0.7 threshold), calculateType. 40 tests.
notes: Code Quality Review found 2 Critical (determineSecondary all-zero, hasOwnProperty prototype pollution) + 3 Important (undersized pool throw, minPerTendency throw, score validation). All 5 fixed in re-implementation. 40 tests pass.

action: Complete rewrite of render.js for TasteType 3.1: renderResult 3-param (self-desc + taste-signature + analysis + details), buildSubCode, renderRadarChart (pure SVG), renderStackedBars, renderDetailsPanel, escapeHtml utility. 60 tests.
notes: Code Quality Review found 2 Critical (XSS innerHTML, attribute injection) + 5 Important (percentage clamp, buildSubCode X placeholder, DOM mock null, behavioral tests, edge cases). All 7 fixed. 60 tests pass.

action: Updated index.html: selectQuestions() at init (24q), renderResult(typeCode, typeData, dimensionResults), new result elements (sub-code, self-desc, taste-signature, analysis, details panel), new CSS, ARIA accessibility, try/catch error handling.
notes: Code Quality Review found 1 Critical (no try/catch around selectQuestions — silent failure) + 1 Important (ARIA attrs on details toggle). Both fixed.

action: Deleted mockup-result.html temporary file. File was untracked, simple removal.
notes: No review needed for simple file deletion.
